heading: Omitted
label: 3001 to 3007 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 3001 to 3007 were omitted pursuant to section 3007 which provided that this chapter terminated .Sept. 30, 1984Section 3001, , , , stated the Congressional findings and purposes for this chapter.Pub. L. 96–460, § 294 Stat. 2044Oct. 15, 1980Section 3002, , , , defined terms for the purposes of this chapter.Pub. L. 96–460, § 394 Stat. 2045Oct. 15, 1980Section 3003, , , , required the Secretary of Commerce to establish in the Department of Commerce an office for Chesapeake Bay Research Coordination.Pub. L. 96–460, § 494 Stat. 2045Oct. 15, 1980Section 3004, , , , established the Chesapeake Bay Research Board.Pub. L. 96–460, § 594 Stat. 2046Oct. 15, 1980Section 3005, , , , authorized appropriations to carry out the purposes of this chapter.Pub. L. 96–460, § 694 Stat. 2047Oct. 15, 1980Section 3006, , , , established the relationship between this chapter and existing Federal, State, and local authority.Pub. L. 96–460, § 794 Stat. 2047Oct. 15, 1980Section 3007, , , , provided that this chapter and the authority conferred by it would terminate .Pub. L. 96–460, § 894 Stat. 2048Oct. 15, 1980Sept. 30, 1984
Short Title, , , provided that this chapter may be cited as the “Chesapeake Bay Research Coordination Act of 1980”.Pub. L. 96–460, § 194 Stat. 2044Oct. 15, 1980
